required_complexity_patterns.notes: Apply form hosted inside iframe or srcdoc iframe shell
Multiple controls sharing name attribute groups (checkbox/radio clusters)
At least two fields with aria-label only and no visible label element
At least one readonly or disabled input with prefilled profile value
Phone split into country code select and local number input in separate wrappers

reference_templates.title: Duplicate element IDs
reference_templates.notes: Two inputs share id="email" - tests disambiguation by name or DOM order
reference_templates.dom_excerpt: Duplicate element IDs

reference_templates.title: Reverse DOM field order
reference_templates.notes: Input element appears before its label in DOM (float-right layout pattern)
reference_templates.dom_excerpt: Reverse DOM order

reference_templates.title: Absurdly long label
reference_templates.dom_excerpt: Long label

prompt_summary: Create a messy, production-real ashby-style job application (single-page, small, tier=high). Widgets: combobox. Required: Apply form hosted inside iframe or srcdoc iframe shell Required: Multiple controls sharing name attribute groups (checkbox/radio clusters) Required: At least two fields with aria-label only and no visible label element Required: At least one readonly or disabled input with prefilled profile value Required: Phone split into country code select and local number input in separate wrappers Reference DOM (Duplicate element IDs): Two inputs share id="email" - tests disambiguation by name or DOM order Reference DOM (Reverse DOM field order): Input element appears before its label in DOM (float-right layout pattern) Reference DOM (Absurdly long label): Single field with 500-character label text Do NOT produce a tutorial-style form where every field is label[for]+native input. Mix native controls with non-semantic production DOM from the patterns below. Implement ALL required complexity patterns: iframe-apply, duplicate-name-attrs, aria-label-only, readonly-prefill, split-phone. Include at least one custom widget (div role=textbox, pill buttons, or listbox combobox). Include at least one labeling strategy besides label-for (aria-label, aria-labelledby, glued spans, placeholder-only). Layout: definition list dl/dt/dd label pairs. Avoid generic centered SaaS card as the only structure. High tier: include shadow DOM host OR iframe apply shell OR wizard/conditional reveal with hidden fields. Mirror structural messiness like these references: Duplicate element IDs; Reverse DOM field order; Absurdly long label.
